nasb.text: “If one man’s ox hurts another’s so that it dies, then they shall sell the live ox and divide its price equally; and also they shall divide the dead ox.

esv.text: “When one man’s ox butts another’s, so that it dies, then they shall sell the live ox and share its price, and the dead beast also they shall share.

cnv.text: “如果有人的牛傷了他鄰舍的牛，以致死亡，他們要把活牛賣了，平分銀子，也要平分死牛。

ccb.text: 倘若某人的牛抵死了别人的牛，两家的主人就要卖掉活牛，平分所得，同时也要平分那头死掉的牛。
